title: Cost of Equity: What happens to the cost of equity when the firm's...
summary: Calculate the weighted average cost of capital or cost of equity using CAPM and capital structure data.
prompt: What happens to the cost of equity when the firm's beta increases?

options.text: Firm value decreases due to higher risk
An increase in the firm's beta indicates a higher level of risk relative to the

solution: An increase in the firm's beta indicates a higher level of risk relative to the market, which leads to a higher expected return required by investors, thus increasing the cost of equity.
